name: @jmcombs/pi-better-toolsy
description_en: Drop-in replacements for Pi's built-in ls, read, grep, find, edit, and write tools — adds .gitignore awareness, path-traversal protection, and $ injection-safe edits.
description_zh: Pi 内置 ls、read、grep、find、edit 和 write 工具的替代品 — 添加 .gitignore 感知、路径遍历保护和 $ 注入安全编辑
